title: Who’s who in the Zoo – Michelle Yuen
content:
In this edition of Who’s who in the Zoo, meet Michelle Yuen, a Zooniverse backend developer.

Who: Michelle Yuen, Backend developer at Zooniverse

Location: Adler Planetarium, Chicago USA

Zooniverse projects: Panoptes, ERAS (Stats service), Talk API, Caesar

What’s something people might not expect about your job or daily routine?

People assume I just sit and code all da
creator: Helen Spiers
sourceDescription: The world's largest and most popular platform for people-powered research. This research is made possible by volunteers—millions of people around the world who come together to assist professional researchers.
